body_transformation: The rounded head now features smooth, gunmetal gray metallic plating with subtle engraved geometric patterns along the crown, while the pointed ears are reinforced with sharp angular steel edges and a faint indigo glow along their inner crevices. The curled tail tip transforms into a rigid, segmented steel bar with chrome silver joints and a deep indigo energy line tracing its length. The short stubby legs are encased in layered armor plates with mechanical pistons visible at the joints, maintaining their low stance and quadruped structure. The turtle-like shell becomes a seamless, reflective steel carapace with engraved radial patterns, replacing the pale blue accents with polished chrome silver highlights.
signature_feature: Shell carapace: seamless steel with engraved radial patterns and deep indigo energy lines.
